nasb.text: They transformed the beauty of His ornaments into pride, and they made the images of their abominations and their detestable things with it; therefore I will make it an abhorrent thing to them.

esv.text: His beautiful ornament they used for pride, and they made their abominable images and their detestable things of it. Therefore I make it an unclean thing to them.

cnv.text: 他們以美麗的飾物為誇耀， 又用這些來鑄造可憎可厭的偶像， 因此我要使它們成為污穢之物。

ccb.text: 他们以华美的饰物为骄傲，并用它制造丑恶可憎的神像，因此，我必使这一切变成他们眼中的污秽之物。
